                                                                                                                                                  • Skill1: Unified Evolution of Skill-Augmented Agents via Reinforcement Learning

                                                                                                                                                  Skill1：通过强化学习实现技能增强智能体的统一进化

                                                                                                                                                  Yaorui Shi 1,2,∗ , Yuxin Chen 2,3,∗ , Zhengxi Lu 2,4 , Yuchun Miao 2,5 , Shugui Liu 1 , Qi Gu 2,† , Xunliang Cai 2 , Xiang Wang 1 , An Zhang 1,† Yaorui Shi 1,2,∗，Yuxin Chen 2,3,∗，Zhengxi Lu 2,4，Yuchun Miao 2,5，Shugui Liu 1，Qi Gu 2,†，Xunliang Cai 2，Xiang Wang 1，An Zhang 1,†

                                                                                                                                                  1 University of Science and Technology of China, 2 Meituan, 3 National University of Singapore, 4 Zhejiang University, 5 Wuhan University, ∗ Equal contribution. 1 中国科学技术大学，2 美团，3 新加坡国立大学，4 浙江大学，5 武汉大学，∗ 共同贡献。

                                                                                                                                                  † Corresponding authors: guqi03@meituan.com,an_zhang@ustc.edu.cn † 通讯作者：guqi03@meituan.com,an_zhang@ustc.edu.cn

                                                                                                                                                  Abstract

                                                                                                                                                  摘要

                                                                                                                                                  A persistent skill library allows language model agents to reuse successful strategies across tasks. Maintaining such a library requires three coupled capabilities. The agent selects a relevant skill, utilizes it during execution, and distills new skills from experience. Existing methods optimize these capabilities in isolation or with separate reward sources, resulting in partial and conflicting evolution. We propose Skill1, a framework that trains a single policy to co-evolve skill selection, utilization, and distillation toward a shared task-outcome objective. The policy generates a query to search the skill library, re-ranks candidates to select one, solves the task conditioned on it, and distills a new skill from the trajectory. All learning derives from a single task-outcome signal. Its low-frequency trend credits selection and its high-frequency variation credits distillation. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebShop show that Skill 1 outperforms prior skill-based and reinforcement learning baselines. Training dynamics confirm the co-evolution of the three capabilities, and ablations show that removing any credit signal degrades the evolution. Our code is available at https://github.com/AlphaLab-USTC/Skill1. 持久化技能库使语言模型智能体能够在不同任务间复用成功策略。维护这样的技能库需要三种相互耦合的能力。智能体选择相关技能，在执行中加以利用，并从经验中提炼新技能。现有方法通常将这些能力分开优化，或使用彼此独立的奖励来源，导致演化不完整且相互冲突。我们提出 Skill1，一个训练单一策略以围绕共享的任务结果目标协同演化技能选择、利用和提炼的框架。该策略生成查询以检索技能库，重排序候选项并选取其一，在其条件下完成任务，并从轨迹中提炼新技能。所有学习均来自单一的任务结果信号。其低频趋势对技能选择进行归因，而高频变化则对技能提炼进行归因。ALFWorld 和 WebShop 上的实验表明，Skill1 优于先前基于技能和强化学习的基线方法。训练动态证实了三种能力的协同演化，而消融实验表明，移除任何一种归因信号都会削弱这种演化。我们的代码已发布于 https://github.com/AlphaLab-USTC/Skill1。

                                                                                                                                                  1 Introduction

                                                                                                                                                  1 引言

                                                                                                                                                  Reinforcement learning (RL) (Sutton and Barto, 2018; Schulman et al., 2017; Shao et al., 2024) has become an important paradigm for training large language model (LLM) agents that interact with complex environments (Guo et al., 2025; Yang et al., 2024; Team et al., 2026; Touvron et al., 2023; Shridhar et al., 2021; Yao et al., 2022a; Xi et al., 2025). Standard RL training treats each task as an isolated episode, where the strategies that lead to success are absorbed only implicitly into the policy parameters and cannot be explicitly reused on future tasks. A natural solution is to augment agents with a persistent skill library that accumulates reusable strategies from past experience, so that the agent can draw on previously successful approaches instead of solving every task from scratch (Wang et al., 2023; Zhao et al., 2024; Xia et al., 2026; Zhang et al., 2026a; Muhtar et al., 2026; Lu et al., 2026). The workflow of these skill-augmented agents can be organized around a three-stage lifecycle (Jiang et al., 2026a): skill selection, where the agent selects a relevant skill from the library for the current task; skill utilization, where the agent executes guided by the selected skill; and skill distillation, where the agent derives new reusable skills from the trajectories. 强化学习（RL）（Sutton and Barto, 2018; Schulman et al., 2017; Shao et al., 2024）已成为训练与复杂环境交互的大语言模型（LLM）智能体的重要范式（Guo et al., 2025; Yang et al., 2024; Team et al., 2026; Touvron et al., 2023; Shridhar et al., 2021; Yao et al., 2022a; Xi et al., 2025）。标准RL训练将每个任务视为一个独立回合，成功所依赖的策略只会隐式吸收到策略参数中，无法在未来任务中显式复用。一个自然的解决方案是为智能体配备一个持久的技能库，将过往经验中可复用的策略不断积累起来，使智能体能够调用先前成功的方法，而非从零解决每个任务（Wang et al., 2023; Zhao et al., 2024; Xia et al., 2026; Zhang et al., 2026a; Muhtar et al., 2026; Lu et al., 2026）。这类技能增强型智能体的工作流可围绕三阶段生命周期组织（Jiang et al., 2026a）：技能选择，即智能体从库中为当前任务选取相关技能；技能利用，即智能体在所选技能的引导下执行；以及技能蒸馏，即智能体从轨迹中提炼新的可复用技能。

                                                                                                                                                  Existing methods have advanced each stage through RL, improving how agents select skills (Zhang et al., 2026b; Wang et al., 2026; Li et al., 2026a; Wu et al., 2025), utilize them (Xia et al., 2026; Muhtar et al., 2026; Zhang et al., 2026a; Li et al., 2026a; Wang et al., 2025a), and distill reusable knowledge (Zhang et al., 2026a; Wang et al., 2025a; Muhtar et al., 2026; Wu et al., 2025). Yet two fundamental questions remain open. (1) How can an agent evolve all three capabilities 现有方法已通过RL推进了各个阶段，改进了智能体如何选择技能（Zhang et al., 2026b; Wang et al., 2026; Li et al., 2026a; Wu et al., 2025）、利用技能（Xia et al., 2026; Muhtar et al., 2026; Zhang et al., 2026a; Li et al., 2026a; Wang et al., 2025a）以及蒸馏可复用知识（Zhang et al., 2026a; Wang et al., 2025a; Muhtar et al., 2026; Wu et al., 2025）。然而，仍有两个根本问题悬而未决。(1) 智能体如何同时进化这三种能力

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Figure 1: Training paradigms for skill-augmented agents. (a) The skill-augmented agent loop consists of selection, utilization, and distillation. (b) Prior methods delegate some stages to external modules without policy gradients (e.g., freezes selection or uses an external teacher for distillation). Skill 1 trains a single policy across all three stages with a shared task-outcome signal. 图1：技能增强型智能体的训练范式。(a) 技能增强型智能体循环由选择、利用和蒸馏构成。(b) 先前方法将部分阶段交由无策略梯度的外部模块处理（例如冻结选择，或使用外部教师进行蒸馏）。Skill 1 通过共享的任务结果信号，在三个阶段上训练单一策略。

                                                                                                                                                  simultaneously? Existing methods apply policy updates to only a subset of the lifecycle, leaving at least one capability unoptimized, leading to optimization bottlenecks (Xia et al., 2026; Muhtar et al., 2026; Zhang et al., 2026a; Wang et al., 2025a). For example, a policy that has learned to use skills well still underperforms if it keeps routing to sub-optimal ones. (2) How can the three capabilities co-evolve toward a shared objective? Prior designs draw the rewards from different sources (Li et al., 2026a; Zhang et al., 2026a; Muhtar et al., 2026). For example, one capability may receive task-outcome reward while another relies on an auxiliary signal such as self-assessed quality or heuristic matching scores. Since the three capabilities jointly determine task success, optimizing them with inconsistent signals creates conflicting pressures. 并同时实现？现有方法只对生命周期中的一部分应用策略更新，至少留下一项能力未被优化，从而造成优化瓶颈（Xia et al., 2026; Muhtar et al., 2026; Zhang et al., 2026a; Wang et al., 2025a）。例如，即便某个策略已学会高效使用技能，如果它仍持续路由到次优技能，表现依然会不佳。(2) 三种能力如何围绕共同目标协同进化？先前设计从不同来源获取奖励（Li et al., 2026a; Zhang et al., 2026a; Muhtar et al., 2026）。例如，一种能力可能获得任务结果奖励，而另一种则依赖诸如自评质量或启发式匹配分数等辅助信号。由于三种能力共同决定任务成败，用不一致的信号来优化它们会产生相互冲突的压力。

                                                                                                                                                  We present Skill1, a framework that achieves unified evolution of skill-augmented agents by training a single policy to co-evolve skill selection, utilization, and distillation. As illustrated in Figure 1, given a new task, the policy first generates a natural-language query to retrieve candidate skills from the library, and then re-ranks the retrieved candidates to select the best match. The policy then performs multi-turn interaction with the environment conditioned on the top-ranked skill. After execution, the policy distills reusable skills from the experience based on its rollouts. 我们提出Skill1，一个通过训练单一策略来协同进化技能选择、利用与蒸馏、从而实现技能增强型智能体统一演化的框架。如图1所示，面对新任务时，策略首先生成自然语言查询，从库中检索候选技能，然后对检索到的候选项重新排序，选出最匹配的技能。随后，策略在所选最高排名技能的条件下，与环境进行多轮交互。执行结束后，策略根据其rollout经验蒸馏出可复用技能。

                                                                                                                                                  We achieve co-evolution of all three capabilities through credit assignment on a single task-outcome signal r(τ) . The outcome directly measures how well the policy solves the current task and serves as the utilization reward. To credit selection and distillation, we decompose this signal into its low-frequency trend and high-frequency variation. The low-frequency trend is defined as the moving average of outcomes associated with each skill. This term reflects skill utility and guides the policy toward consistently effective skills. The high-frequency variation is approximated with the deviation of the current outcome from the trend. This term captures whether a newly distilled skill improves upon the library's current boundary, and rewards the policy for producing useful skills. 我们通过对单一任务结果信号r(τ)进行信用分配，实现了三种能力的协同进化。该结果直接衡量策略完成当前任务的程度，并作为利用奖励。为了对选择和蒸馏进行归因，我们将这一信号分解为低频趋势和高频变化。低频趋势定义为与每个技能对应结果的移动平均。该项反映技能效用，并引导策略转向持续有效的技能。高频变化则用当前结果相对趋势的偏差来近似。该项捕捉新蒸馏出的技能是否优于库的当前边界，并奖励策略生成有用技能。

                                                                                                                                                  We empirically evaluate Skill1 on ALFWorld (Shridhar et al., 2021) and WebShop (Yao et al., 2022a). Skill1 achieves 97.5% success rate on ALFWorld, surpassing all other baseline skill-augmented agents. Training dynamics confirm that selection precision, utilization success rate, and library quality improve simultaneously under the shared signal. Ablations show that removing any single stage's credit-assignment signal degrades all three capabilities, providing evidence for their mutual dependence. 我们在 ALFWorld（Shridhar 等，2021）和 WebShop（Yao 等，2022a）上对 Skill1 进行了实证评估。Skill1 在 ALFWorld 上的成功率达到 97.5%，超越所有其他基线的技能增强型智能体。训练动态表明，在共享信号的驱动下，选择精度、使用成功率与知识库质量同时提升。消融实验显示，移除任意单一阶段的归因信号都会削弱这三项能力，证明它们相互依赖。

                                                                                                                                                  2 Preliminary: LLM Agent with Skill Library

                                                                                                                                                  2 预备知识：带技能库的 LLM 智能体

                                                                                                                                                  Task formulation. We formulate the skill-augmented agent learning problem as a POMDP (Lauri et al.,2022) M=(S,A,O,T,Ω,R,γ) . A state S=(x,e,B) comprises a task instruction x from dataset D ,the environment state e ,and a persistent skill library B={s1,s2,…} . At each turn the agent selects an action a∈A to send to the environment. The observation function Ω exposes a partial view ot=(x,et,z) ,where z is the skill selected from B via a frozen encoder E . The overall training objective for the workflow can be defined as: 任务形式化。我们将带技能增强的智能体学习问题表述为一个 POMDP（Lauri et al.,2022） M=(S,A,O,T,Ω,R,γ) 。状态 S=(x,e,B) 包括来自数据集 D 的任务指令 x 、环境状态 e 以及一个持久化的技能库 B={s1,s2,…} 。在每一轮，智能体选择一个动作 a∈A 发送到环境。观测函数 Ω 提供部分视图 ot=(x,et,z) ，其中 z 是通过冻结编码器 E 从 B 中选取的技能。工作流的整体训练目标可定义为：

                                                                                                                                                  (1)maxθ⁡Ex∼D,τ∼πθ(⋅∣x)[r(τ)]

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Figure 2: Overview of the Skill1 framework. (a) The policy generates a query and re-ranks retrieved candidates to select a skill. (b) The policy performs multi-turn interaction conditioned on the selected skill. (c) The policy reflects on the trajectory and distills a reusable skill. All learning signals are derived from the task-outcome r(τ) to achieve co-evolution of three capabilities. 图2：Skill1 框架概览。(a) 策略生成查询并重新排序检索到的候选项以选择技能。(b) 策略在所选技能条件下进行多轮交互。(c) 策略对轨迹进行反思并提炼出可复用技能。所有学习信号均来自任务结果 r(τ) ，以实现三种能力的协同进化。

                                                                                                                                                  where πθ is optimized with RL algorithms such as GRPO (Shao et al.,2024) (cf. Appendix B). 其中 πθ 通过 GRPO（Shao et al.,2024）等 RL 算法进行优化（见附录B）。

                                                                                                                                                  Skills for LLM agents. A skill s∈B consists of a natural-language strategy s .strat that describes how to act and a scenario description s .desc that characterizes when the skill applies. The agent maintains the skill library B={s1,s2,…} as it continuously explores the environment. To reuse a skill, the agent generates its action conditioned on the skill strategy: LLM 智能体的技能。一个技能 s∈B 由自然语言策略 s .strat 和场景描述 s .desc 组成，前者描述如何行动，后者刻画该技能适用的时机。智能体在持续探索环境的同时维护技能库 B={s1,s2,…} 。为复用某个技能，智能体在该技能策略的条件下生成动作：

                                                                                                                                                  (2)at∼πθ(⋅∣x,z . strat, o≤t).

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  To interact with a skill library,the agent selects skills from B ,utilizes them during execution (Eq. 2), and distills new skills back into B . In  § 3 ,we show how to optimize all three stages jointly through a single policy,deriving every learning signal from the task outcome r(τ) . 为与技能库交互，智能体从 B 中选择技能，在执行过程中使用它们（式2），并将新技能提炼回 B 。在  § 3 中，我们展示了如何通过单一策略联合优化这三个阶段，并从任务结果 r(τ) 中导出每一个学习信号。

                                                                                                                                                  3 Method

                                                                                                                                                  3 方法

                                                                                                                                                  We introduce Skill1,a framework that trains a single policy πθ to co-evolve skill selection,utilization, and distillation toward a shared task-outcome objective (Figure 2). We first describe the workflow (§3.1),then derive all learning signals from the task outcome r(τ) (§3.2),and finally formulate the joint optimization objective (§3.3). 我们提出 Skill1，这是一种框架，训练单一策略 πθ，使其在共享的任务结果目标下共同演化技能选择、技能运用与蒸馏能力（图2）。我们首先描述工作流程（§3.1），随后从任务结果 r(τ) 推导所有学习信号（§3.2），最后构建联合优化目标（§3.3）。

                                                                                                                                                  3.1 Agent Workflow

                                                                                                                                                  3.1 智能体工作流

                                                                                                                                                  For each task x∼D ,the policy πθ performs three stages in sequence. A complete trajectory takes the form τ=(q,z,a1,o1,…,aT,oT,s new ) ,where q is the selection query, z is the selected skill (or ∅ ),the action-observation pairs constitute the multi-turn interaction,and s new  is the distilled skill. The environment returns a terminal reward r(τ)∈{0,1} . Prompt templates are in Appendix G. 对于每个任务 x∼D ，策略 πθ 依次执行三个阶段。完整轨迹可表示为 τ=(q,z,a1,o1,…,aT,oT,s new ) ，其中 q 是选择查询，z 是所选技能（或 ∅ ），动作-观察对构成多轮交互，s new  是蒸馏后的技能。环境返回终止奖励 r(τ)∈{0,1} 。提示模板见附录 G。

                                                                                                                                                  Skill selection. Given a task x ,the policy generates a natural-language query q∼πθ(⋅∣x) to search the skill library B . A frozen encoder E retrieves the top- K candidates by semantic similarity: 技能选择。给定一个任务 x ，策略生成一个自然语言查询 q∼πθ(⋅∣x) 以检索技能库 B 。一个冻结的编码器 E 根据语义相似度检索前 K 个候选：

                                                                                                                                                  (3)BK=top−Ks∈Bsim(E(q),E(s .desc )).

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  The policy then re-ranks these candidates by generating a permutation σ∼πθ(⋅∣x,BK) ,and the top-ranked skill z is provided for utilization. Both query generation and re-ranking are produced by πθ ,so selection is directly optimizable through the policy gradient. 随后，策略通过生成一个排列 σ∼πθ(⋅∣x,BK) 对这些候选重新排序，排名最高的技能 z 被提供用于使用。查询生成和重新排序都由 πθ 产生，因此选择可通过策略梯度直接优化。

                                                                                                                                                  Skill utilization. The policy interacts with the environment for up to T turns conditioned on the selected skill: τ∼πθ(⋅∣x,z .strat, o≤t) . For each task, G rollouts are sampled independently,each performing its own selection, utilization, and distillation. 技能使用。策略在所选技能的条件下与环境交互，最多进行 T 轮：τ∼πθ(⋅∣x,z .strat, o≤t) 。对于每个任务，采样 G 次 rollout，且各自独立执行选择、使用和蒸馏。

                                                                                                                                                  Skill distillation. After each rollout, πθ reflects on the trajectory to produce: (i) a reusable strategy s new  .strat ∼πθ(⋅∣x,τ) summarizing the approach,and (ii) a scenario description s new  .desc ∼πθ(⋅∣x,τ) characterizing when the skill applies. A new skill is admitted to B only when r(τ)=1 . When the library reaches its capacity |B|=Nmax ,the skill with the lowest retirement score U(s)⋅log⁡(n(s)) is removed,where n(s) is the number of times s has been selected. This heuristic retires skills that are both low-utility and infrequently used while preserving well-tested high-utility skills. 技能蒸馏。每次 rollout 之后，πθ 会反思轨迹以生成：(i) 一个可复用的策略 s new  .strat ∼πθ(⋅∣x,τ) ，概括该方法；以及 (ii) 一个场景描述 s new  .desc ∼πθ(⋅∣x,τ) ，刻画该技能适用的时机。只有当 r(τ)=1 时，才会将新技能纳入 B 。当技能库达到容量 |B|=Nmax 时，得分最低的退休技能 U(s)⋅log⁡(n(s)) 会被移除，其中 n(s) 是 s 被选中的次数。该启发式方法会淘汰既低效又少用的技能，同时保留经过充分验证且高效的技能。

                                                                                                                                                  3.2 Reward Assignment

                                                                                                                                                  3.2 奖励分配

                                                                                                                                                  Co-evolution requires that each capability receives targeted learning signals from the shared task outcome r(τ) . The challenge is that the three capabilities operate at different temporal scopes: utilization concerns the current episode, selection concerns which skills are consistently effective across episodes, and distillation concerns whether new experience improves upon what the library already covers. We address this by decomposing r(τ) into its low-frequency trend and high-frequency variation, assigning credit to each capability without auxiliary models or additional rollouts. 协同进化要求每种能力都能从共享的任务结果 r(τ) 获得有针对性的学习信号。难点在于三种能力的时间尺度不同：利用关注当前回合，选择关注跨回合哪些技能始终有效，蒸馏则关注新经验是否优于库中已有的覆盖。我们通过将 r(τ) 分解为低频趋势和高频波动，在不使用辅助模型或额外采样的情况下，对每种能力进行归因。

                                                                                                                                                  Crediting utilization. The task outcome directly measures how well the policy executes with the given skill and serves as the utilization reward: 归功于利用。任务结果直接衡量策略在给定技能下执行得多好，因此利用奖励定义为：

                                                                                                                                                  (4)Ri util =r(τi).

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Crediting selection. Selection improves through two mechanisms. First,the query q is part of the rollout prefix and receives policy gradients through the utilization objective (Eq. 8). Better queries retrieve better candidates and lead to higher r(τ) ,so query quality co-improves with task performance without a dedicated reward. 归功于选择。选择会通过两种机制得到改进。首先，查询 q 是回合前缀的一部分，并通过利用目标（式 8）获得策略梯度。更好的查询会检索到更优候选，从而带来更高的 r(τ) ，因此查询质量会随任务表现共同提升，而无需专门的奖励。

                                                                                                                                                  Second, re-ranking requires an explicit signal that reflects long-term skill quality rather than single-episode outcomes. We maintain the trend of each skill as a per-skill utility score, updated after each rollout via exponential moving average: 其次，重排序需要一个显式信号，用来反映长期的技能质量，而非单回合结果。我们为每个技能维护其趋势，并将其作为按技能计算的效用分数，在每次回合后通过指数滑动平均更新：

                                                                                                                                                  (5)U(s)←(1−α)⋅U(s)+α⋅r(τi),∀s∈BK.

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  We update all retrieved candidates rather than only the selected one, treating co-retrieval as evidence of relevance to the same task distribution. The trend smooths out per-episode variance and accumulates each skill’s long-term contribution. We denote the best available utility as U^i=maxs∈BKi⁡U(s) , which serves as the library baseline for subsequent reward derivations. The trend supervises re-ranking by rewarding the policy for producing a permutation σi that agrees with the utility ordering. Here we use normalized discounted cumulative gain (NDCG) as the rubric: 我们更新所有检索到的候选，而不仅是被选择的那个，将协同检索视为与同一任务分布相关性的证据。该趋势能平滑每回合的方差，并累积每个技能的长期贡献。我们将可获得的最佳效用记为 U^i=maxs∈BKi⁡U(s) ，它作为后续奖励推导的库基线。该趋势通过以下方式监督重排序：当策略产生的一个排列 σi 与效用排序一致时给予奖励。这里我们使用标准化折扣累计增益（NDCG）作为度量：

                                                                                                                                                  (6)Ri rerank =NDCG(σi,argsort(−U(BKi))).

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Crediting distillation. The ideal distillation signal would measure whether a newly distilled skill improves future task performance, but that future outcome is unavailable at training time. We approximate it with the variation of the current outcome relative to the library's trend: 归功于蒸馏。理想的蒸馏信号应衡量新蒸馏出的技能是否提升未来任务表现，但未来结果在训练时不可得。我们用当前结果相对库趋势的波动来近似：

                                                                                                                                                  (7)Ri distill =r(τi)−U^i,

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  where U^i=maxs∈BKi⁡U(s) is the highest trend among the retrieved candidates. A positive variation indicates that the current experience surpasses what the library already covers, so the distilled skill is worth admitting. A negative variation discourages redundant distillation. 其中 U^i=maxs∈BKi⁡U(s) 是所有被检索候选中的最高趋势。若波动为正，说明当前经验超出了库已有覆盖，因此该蒸馏技能值得接纳。若波动为负，则会抑制多余的蒸馏。

                                                                                                                                                  Algorithm 1 Pseudo Code of Skill1 算法 1 Skill1 伪代码

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Require: πθ,B,E,K,G,λ1,λ2,α 需要：πθ,B,E,K,G,λ1,λ2,α

                                                                                                                                                      for batch of N tasks,each with G rollouts do     针对一批 N 任务，每个任务包含 G 次回合 do

                                                                                                                                                          for sample i=1,…,N⋅G do         针对样本 i=1,…,N⋅G do

                                                                                                                                                              qi←πθ(xi)

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                              BK←top-Ks∈Bsim(E(qi),E(s .desc ))

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                              σi←πθ(xi,BK);zi←BK[σi(1)]

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                              τi∼πθ(⋅∣xi,zi .strat )

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                              (s new ,i .strat ,s new ,i .desc )←πθ(xi,τi)

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                          end for

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                          Ri util ←r(τi);U^i←maxs∈BKi⁡U(s)

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                          Ri distill ←r(τi)−U^i

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                          Ri rerank ←NDCG(σi,argsort(−U(BKi)))

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                          U(s)←(1−α)U(s)+αr(τi),∀s∈BKi

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                          Admit s new ,i to B if r(τi)=1         若 r(τi)=1 ，则将 s new ,i 接纳到 B

                                                                                                                                                          θ←θ+∇θ[J util +λ1J rerank +λ2J distill ]

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                      end for     end for

                                                                                                                                                  ⊳ Agent workflow (Sec 3.1) ⊳ 智能体流程（第 3.1 节）

                                                                                                                                                      ⊳ Skill selection: search     ⊳ 技能选择：搜索

                                                                                                                                                      ⊳ Skill Selection: re-rank     ⊳ 技能选择：重排

                                                                                                                                                      ⊳ Skill distillation     ⊳ 技能蒸馏

                                                                                                                                                      ⊳ Skill distillation     ⊳ 技能蒸馏

                                                                                                                                                  ⊳ Reward assignment (Sec 3.2) ⊳ 奖励分配（第3.2节）

                                                                                                                                                      ⊳ Variation as distillation credit     ⊳ 作为蒸馏奖励的变化

                                                                                                                                                      ⊳ Trend as selection credit     ⊳ 作为选择奖励的趋势

                                                                                                                                                      ⊳ Update utility scores     ⊳ 更新效用分数

                                                                                                                                                      ⊳ Joint optimization (Sec 3.3)     ⊳ 联合优化（第3.3节）

                                                                                                                                                  D Joint optimization (Sec 3.3) D 联合优化（第3.3节）

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  3.3 Joint Optimization

                                                                                                                                                  3.3 联合优化

                                                                                                                                                  Each rollout τi is a concatenation of four generation segments produced by πθ : the selection query qi ,the re-ranking permutation σi ,the action sequence a1:T ,and the distilled skill s new ,i . We assign each segment its own reward signal (§3.2) and optimize them jointly in a single gradient step using GRPO (Shao et al.,2024) (cf. Appendix B),which normalizes rewards within the G rollouts of each task into group-relative advantages. 每次 rollout τi 都由 πθ 生成的四段连续生成组成：选择查询 qi 、重排序置换 σi 、动作序列 a1:T 以及蒸馏后的技能 s new ,i 。我们为每一段分配其独立的奖励信号（§3.2），并使用 GRPO（Shao et al.,2024）（参见附录 B）在一次梯度更新中对它们进行联合优化；该方法会在每个任务的 G rollouts 内对奖励进行归一化，转化为组相对优势。

                                                                                                                                                  Utilization and query. The action tokens a1:T are conditioned on (xi,zi) and optimized by the task outcome Ri util =r(τi) . The query qi precedes the actions in the same sequence and receives gradients through the same objective: 利用与查询。动作 token a1:T 由 (xi,zi) 条件化，并根据任务结果 Ri util =r(τi) 进行优化。查询 qi 在同一序列中位于动作之前，并通过相同的目标接收梯度：

                                                                                                                                                  (8)J util (θ)=J GRPO (θ;{τ1,…,τG},{A^1,…,A^G}).

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Re-ranking. The permutation σi is generated conditioned on the task xi and retrieved candidates BKi ,and reinforced by the ranking reward Ri rerank  . Since different rollouts generate different queries, their retrieved candidate sets BKi differ,thus inner group comparison becomes meaningless. We thus optimize each permutation independently with a REINFORCE-style (Williams, 1992) objective: 重排序。置换 σi 在任务 xi 与检索候选 BKi 的条件下生成，并由排序奖励 Ri rerank  得到强化。由于不同 rollouts 生成的是不同查询，它们检索到的候选集合 BKi 也不同，因此组内比较没有意义。我们因此为每个置换分别采用类似 REINFORCE（Williams, 1992）的目标进行优化：

                                                                                                                                                  (9)J rerank (θ)=1N⋅G∑i⁡Ri rerank ⋅log⁡πθ(σi∣xi,BKi).

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Distillation. The distilled skill tokens (s new ,i .strat, s new ,i .desc) are generated conditioned on the task xi and trajectory τi ,and reinforced by the variation Ri distill  . Advantages A^i distill  are normalized separately from those of utilization since the two rewards measure different aspects of same outcomes: 蒸馏。蒸馏后的技能 token (s new ,i .strat, s new ,i .desc) 在任务 xi 与轨迹 τi 的条件下生成，并由变化 Ri distill  得到强化。优势 A^i distill  会分别进行归一化，因为这两个奖励衡量的是同一结果的不同方面：

                                                                                                                                                  (10)J distill (θ)=J GRPO (θ;{s new, 1,…,s new, G},{A^1 distill ,…,A^G distill }).

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Total objective. All terms are combined in a single update: 总目标。所有项在一次更新中合并：

                                                                                                                                                  (11)J(θ)=J util (θ)+λ1J rerank (θ)+λ2J distill (θ).

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  The utility score U(s) is updated non-parametrically via Eq. (5). The full procedure is summarized in Algorithm 1. Training hyperparameter settings are in Appendix C. 效用分数 U(s) 会通过式（5）以非参数方式进行更新。完整流程见算法 1。训练超参数设置见附录 C。

                                                                                                                                                  4 Experiments

                                                                                                                                                  4 实验

                                                                                                                                                  4.1 Experimental Setup

                                                                                                                                                  4.1 实验设置

                                                                                                                                                  Environments. We evaluate on ALFWorld (Shridhar et al., 2021), a text-based household environment requiring multi-step planning and object interaction, and WebShop (Yao et al., 2022a), an online-shopping simulator where agents search and purchase products matching user specifications. We report success rate (%) on the test split for both environments. 环境。我们在 ALFWorld（Shridhar 等，2021）上进行评估，这是一个基于文本的家庭环境，要求多步规划与物体交互；以及在 WebShop（Yao 等，2022a）上进行评估，这是一个在线购物模拟器，代理会根据用户规格检索并购买匹配的商品。我们在两个环境的测试划分上报告成功率（%）。

                                                                                                                                                  Table 1: Main results on ALFWorld and WebShop (Success Rate, %). Bold denotes best results; ↑ indicates improvement over the previous best. "Avg." stands for average success rate and "Succ." stands for success rate. 表 1：ALFWorld 和 WebShop 的主要结果（成功率，%）。加粗表示最佳结果；↑ 表示相较于先前最佳的提升。“Avg.”表示平均成功率，“Succ.”表示成功率。

                                                                                                                                                  MethodALFWorld (Success %)WebShop
                                                                                                                                                  PickLookCleanHeatCoolPick2Avg.ScoreSucc.
                                                                                                                                                  w/o Training
                                                                                                                                                  Zero-Shot33.421.619.36.92.83.214.826.47.8
                                                                                                                                                  ReAct (Yao et al., 2022b)48.535.434.313.218.217.631.246.219.5
                                                                                                                                                  Reflexion (Shinn et al., 2023)62.041.644.930.936.323.842.758.128.8
                                                                                                                                                  Mem0 (Chhikara et al., 2025)54.055.026.936.420.87.733.623.92.0
                                                                                                                                                  ExpeL (Zhao et al., 2024)21.067.055.052.071.06.046.330.911.2
                                                                                                                                                  RL-Trained w/o Skills
                                                                                                                                                  PPO (Schulman et al., 2017)92.364.092.589.580.368.880.481.468.7
                                                                                                                                                  RLOO (Ahmadian et al., 2024)87.678.287.381.371.948.975.580.365.7
                                                                                                                                                  GRPO (Shao et al., 2024)90.866.189.374.772.564.777.679.366.1
                                                                                                                                                  GiGPO (Feng et al., 2025)97.782.798.883.789.379.290.884.472.8
                                                                                                                                                  RL-Trained w/ Skills
                                                                                                                                                  EvolveR (Wu et al., 2025)64.933.346.413.333.333.343.842.517.6
                                                                                                                                                  Mem0 (Chhikara et al., 2025) w/ GRPO78.154.856.131.065.026.954.758.137.5
                                                                                                                                                  SimpleMem (Liu et al., 2026a) w/ GRPO89.536.360.050.064.926.362.567.846.9
                                                                                                                                                  SkillRL (Xia et al., 2026)97.971.490.090.095.587.589.985.272.7
                                                                                                                                                  RetroAgent (Zhang et al., 2026a)97.990.999.292.985.391.094.988.982.3
                                                                                                                                                  Skill1 (Ours)100.098.6 47.797.3$\mathbf{{99.2}_{ \uparrow {6.3}}}$96.1~0.696.0~15.097.5~2.689.782.9
                                                                                                                                                  方法ALFWorld（成功率 %）WebShop
                                                                                                                                                  拿取查看清洁加热冷却拿取2平均得分成功
                                                                                                                                                  无训练
                                                                                                                                                  零样本33.421.619.36.92.83.214.826.47.8
                                                                                                                                                  ReAct（Yao et al., 2022b）48.535.434.313.218.217.631.246.219.5
                                                                                                                                                  Reflexion（Shinn et al., 2023）62.041.644.930.936.323.842.758.128.8
                                                                                                                                                  Mem0（Chhikara et al., 2025）54.055.026.936.420.87.733.623.92.0
                                                                                                                                                  ExpeL（Zhao et al., 2024）21.067.055.052.071.06.046.330.911.2
                                                                                                                                                  仅用RL训练（无技能）
                                                                                                                                                  PPO（Schulman et al., 2017）92.364.092.589.580.368.880.481.468.7
                                                                                                                                                  RLOO（Ahmadian et al., 2024）87.678.287.381.371.948.975.580.365.7
                                                                                                                                                  GRPO（Shao et al., 2024）90.866.189.374.772.564.777.679.366.1
                                                                                                                                                  GiGPO（Feng et al., 2025）97.782.798.883.789.379.290.884.472.8
                                                                                                                                                  仅用RL训练（含技能）
                                                                                                                                                  EvolveR（Wu et al., 2025）64.933.346.413.333.333.343.842.517.6
                                                                                                                                                  Mem0（Chhikara et al., 2025）+ GRPO78.154.856.131.065.026.954.758.137.5
                                                                                                                                                  SimpleMem（Liu et al., 2026a）+ GRPO89.536.360.050.064.926.362.567.846.9
                                                                                                                                                  SkillRL（Xia et al., 2026）97.971.490.090.095.587.589.985.272.7
                                                                                                                                                  RetroAgent（Zhang et al., 2026a）97.990.999.292.985.391.094.988.982.3
                                                                                                                                                  Skill1（我们的方法）100.098.6 47.797.3$\mathbf{{99.2}_{ \uparrow {6.3}}}$96.1~0.696.0~15.097.5~2.689.782.9

                                                                                                                                                  Training. For Skill1, the initial policy is Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct (Yang et al., 2024) and the frozen encoder E is all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (Reimers and Gurevych,2019). We train with GRPO under G=16 and lr=1×10−6 . The skill library is initialized empty with capacity |B|≤5000 . The training data uses the train split of the corresponding environments. Full hyperparameters are in Appendix C. 训练。对于 Skill1，初始策略为 Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct（Yang et al., 2024），冻结编码器E为 all-MiniLM-L6-v2（Reimers and Gurevych,2019）。我们在G=16和lr=1×10−6下使用 GRPO 训练。技能库初始为空，容量为|B|≤5000。训练数据使用对应环境的 train 划分。完整超参数见附录 C。

                                                                                                                                                  Baselines. We compare three categories of methods in Table 1: (1) training-free agents such as ReAct (Yao et al., 2022b), Reflexion (Shinn et al., 2023), Mem0 (Chhikara et al., 2025), and ExpeL (Zhao et al., 2024); (2) RL-trained methods without skills such as PPO (Schulman et al., 2017), RLOO (Ahmadian et al., 2024), GRPO (Shao et al., 2024), and GiGPO (Feng et al., 2025); and (3) RL-trained methods with skills such as EvolveR (Wu et al., 2025), Mem0 and SimpleMem (Liu et al., 2026a) optimized with GRPO, SkillRL (Xia et al., 2026), and RetroAgent (Zhang et al., 2026a). All baselines use the same base model Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct for fair comparison. 基线。我们在表 1 中比较三类方法：（1）无需训练的智能体，如 ReAct（Yao et al., 2022b）、Reflexion（Shinn et al., 2023）、Mem0（Chhikara et al., 2025）和 ExpeL（Zhao et al., 2024）；（2）不含技能的 RL 训练方法，如 PPO（Schulman et al., 2017）、RLOO（Ahmadian et al., 2024）、GRPO（Shao et al., 2024）和 GiGPO（Feng et al., 2025）；以及（3）含技能的 RL 训练方法，如 EvolveR（Wu et al., 2025）、使用 GRPO 优化的 Mem0 和 SimpleMem（Liu et al., 2026a）、SkillRL（Xia et al., 2026）以及 RetroAgent（Zhang et al., 2026a）。为公平比较，所有基线均使用相同的基础模型 Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct。

                                                                                                                                                  4.2 Main Results

                                                                                                                                                  4.2 主要结果

                                                                                                                                                  Table 1 presents the main results. We reproduce RetroAgent with the official implementation and borrow other baseline results from prior research (Feng et al., 2025; Xia et al., 2026; Jiang et al., 2025a). Skill1 results are averaged across three runs, and we report statistical analysis in Appendix D. 表1给出了主要结果。我们使用官方实现复现RetroAgent，并从先前研究中借用其他基线结果（Feng et al., 2025; Xia et al., 2026; Jiang et al., 2025a）。Skill1结果取三次运行的平均值，并在附录D中报告统计分析。

                                                                                                                                                  Skill 1 achieves the highest overall performance. On ALFWorld, Skill1 reaches 97.5% average success rate, surpassing the previous best RetroAgent by 2.6 points and ranking first on five out of six task types. The exception is Clean, where Skill1 falls slightly below strongest baseline RetroAgent, yet this gap is not statistically significant according to Appendix D. On WebShop, Skill1 also demonstrates the best performance across all methods. Skill 1达到了最高的整体性能。在ALFWorld上，Skill1的平均成功率为97.5%，比此前最佳RetroAgent高2.6个百分点，并在六种任务类型中的五种上排名第一。例外是Clean，在该任务上Skill1略低于最强基线RetroAgent，但根据附录D，该差距不具有统计显著性。在WebShop上，Skill1在所有方法中同样表现最佳。

                                                                                                                                                  An explicit skill library complements parameter-only RL. GiGPO, the strongest RL-only method, absorbs strategies implicitly into parameters and cannot explicitly reuse them across tasks. Skill1 surpasses it by 6.7 points, with the largest gains on Look and Pick2 where composing multiple sub-procedures benefits most from reusable skills. 显式的技能库补充了仅参数驱动的强化学习。GiGPO是最强的RL-only方法，它将策略隐式吸收到参数中，无法在不同任务间显式复用。Skill1比它高出6.7个百分点，其中在Look和Pick2上提升最大，因为在这些任务中，组合多个子流程最能受益于可复用技能。

                                                                                                                                                  Unified optimization outperforms methods that leave part of the lifecycle unoptimized. RetroA-gent optimizes utilization and distillation with separate intrinsic rewards but provides no gradient signal for selection. SkillRL freezes its selection mechanism after cold-start SFT. Skill1 optimizes all three stages jointly through a single task-outcome signal. The comparison reveals a clear trend that agent performance increases with the degree of co-evolution. 统一优化优于那些对生命周期部分环节未进行优化的方法。RetroA-gent使用独立的内在奖励来优化利用与蒸馏，但在选择上没有梯度信号。SkillRL在冷启动SFT之后冻结其选择机制。Skill1通过单一的任务-结果信号联合优化三个阶段。比较结果显示，随着协同进化程度的提高，智能体性能呈现出明确的上升趋势。

                                                                                                                                                  Table 2: Ablation study on ALFWorld (Success Rate %). Upper block ablates workflow components; lower block ablates training objectives. 表2：ALFWorld上的消融研究（成功率%）。上方模块消融工作流组件；下方模块消融训练目标。

                                                                                                                                                  PickLookCleanHeatCoolPick2Avg.
                                                                                                                                                  Skill1100.098.697.399.296.196.097.5
                                                                                                                                                  w/o Select.96.990.398.090.486.585.391.8
                                                                                                                                                  w/o Distill.97.488.598.196.187.689.592.4
                                                                                                                                                  w/o Library96.771.594.970.771.565.580.9
                                                                                                                                                  w/ ${\lambda }_{1} = 0$99.580.598.8100.090.684.994.0
                                                                                                                                                  w/ ${\lambda }_{2} = 0$100.085.495.596.491.096.294.9
                                                                                                                                                  w/ ${\lambda }_{1} = {\lambda }_{2} = 0$98.174.995.695.679.587.290.2
                                                                                                                                                  拿取观察清洁加热冷却拿取2平均
                                                                                                                                                  Skill1100.098.697.399.296.196.097.5
                                                                                                                                                  不选取96.990.398.090.486.585.391.8
                                                                                                                                                  不蒸馏97.488.598.196.187.689.592.4
                                                                                                                                                  不使用库96.771.594.970.771.565.580.9
                                                                                                                                                  w/ ${\lambda }_{1} = 0$99.580.598.8100.090.684.994.0
                                                                                                                                                  w/ ${\lambda }_{2} = 0$100.085.495.596.491.096.294.9
                                                                                                                                                  w/ ${\lambda }_{1} = {\lambda }_{2} = 0$98.174.995.695.679.587.290.2

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Figure 3: Training dynamics of the three capability metrics. Full Skill1 achieves fast and unified convergence across all stages. Removing selection signal (green) or both selection and distillation signals (orange) slows convergence of all capabilities. 图3：三项能力指标的训练动态。完整的Skill1在所有阶段实现快速且统一的收敛。移除选择信号（绿色）或同时移除选择与蒸馏信号（橙色）会减慢所有能力的收敛。

                                                                                                                                                  4.3 Analysis

                                                                                                                                                  4.3 分析

                                                                                                                                                  4.3.1 Ablation Study

                                                                                                                                                  4.3.1 消融研究

                                                                                                                                                  We remove workflow components and zero out auxiliary objective weights to isolate each design choice. All variants share the same base model and training budget. Results are reported in Table 2. 我们移除工作流组件并将辅助目标权重置零，以隔离各项设计选择。所有变体共享相同的基础模型和训练预算。结果见表2。

                                                                                                                                                  The skill library is the foundation, and distillation makes it effective. Removing the library entirely causes the largest drop, from 97.5% to 80.9%, with Heat and Pick2 losing over 28 points each. These task types require composing multi-step sub-procedures that benefit most from reusable skills. Removing distillation while keeping the library still reduces performance by 5.1 points. Without distillation the library stores raw trajectories rather than condensed strategies, making selection noisier and reuse less effective. 技能库是基础，而蒸馏使其发挥作用。完全移除技能库会造成最大幅度的下降，从97.5%降至80.9%，其中Heat和Pick2各自下降超过28个百分点。这些任务类型需要组合多步子程序，最能受益于可复用技能。保留技能库但移除蒸馏仍会使性能下降5.1个百分点。没有蒸馏时，技能库存储的是原始轨迹而非压缩后的策略，使选择更嘈杂，复用也更不有效。

                                                                                                                                                  Selection loss propagates to downstream stages. Without selection the average drops by 5.7 points, concentrated on Heat and Pick2 where routing to the correct multi-step skill matters most. Notably, this degradation occurs even though the utilization reward remains intact, showing that poor skill routing bottlenecks the entire pipeline regardless of the policy's solving ability. 选择损失会向下游阶段传播。去掉选择后，平均性能下降5.7个百分点，主要集中在Heat和Pick2上，因为在这些任务中路由到正确的多步技能最为关键。值得注意的是，即使利用奖励仍然保留，这种退化依然发生，说明不良的技能路由会成为整个流水线的瓶颈，而不受策略求解能力影响。

                                                                                                                                                  The two auxiliary objectives are complementary. Setting λ1=0 or λ2=0 individually reduces performance by 3.5 and 2.6 points respectively. Removing both yields a sharper decline to 90.2% , worse than removing each stage individually. This gap shows that the signals benefit utilization beyond their direct targets, confirming that both signals are necessary to sustain full co-evolution. 这两个辅助目标是互补的。单独设置λ1=0或λ2=0会使性能分别下降3.5和2.6个百分点。两者同时移除则会导致更明显的下降至90.2%，比单独移除任一阶段都更差。这一差距表明，这些信号对利用的促进超出了其直接目标，印证了这两个信号对于维持完整共演化都是必要的。

                                                                                                                                                  4.3.2 Co-evolution Dynamics

                                                                                                                                                  4.3.2 共演化动态

                                                                                                                                                  Figure 3 tracks three capability metrics across training: (1) selection precision, the average skill utility scores U(s) ; (2) task-outcome reward r(τ) for utilization; and (3) distillation positive rate, the fraction of new rollouts exceeding the average of retrieved ones U^i . We compare the full system against ablations that progressively remove credit-assignment signals. 图3跟踪了训练过程中的三项能力指标：(1) 选择精度，即平均技能效用得分U(s)；(2) 用于利用的任务结果奖励r(τ)；以及(3) 蒸馏正率，即新 rollout 超过检索结果平均值的比例U^i。我们将完整系统与逐步移除归因信号的消融版本进行比较。

                                                                                                                                                  The three capabilities exhibit mutual reinforcement under unified training. Selection precision converges first, reaching 0.95 by step 20 . The resulting high-quality skill supply then accelerates the other two stages, with both utilization and distillation reaching 0.8 by step 60 . This sequential acceleration shows that improvements in one stage propagate forward through the lifecycle. 在统一训练下，这三项能力相互促进。选择精度最先收敛，在第20步达到0.95。随后，高质量的技能供给加速了另外两个阶段，利用和蒸馏都在第60步达到0.8。这个循序加速表明，一阶段的提升会沿着整个生命周期向前传播。

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Figure 4: Task-skill similarity at three training checkpoints. The trend signal drives continuous improvement in selection quality. 图4：三个训练检查点上的任务-技能相似度。趋势信号推动选择质量持续提升。

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Figure 5: Top-skill utility (U^) during training. The variation signal drives the policy to distill increasingly effective skills. 图5：训练期间的最佳技能效用(U^)。变化信号驱动策略蒸馏出越来越有效的技能。

                                                                                                                                                  Ablating any credit-assignment signal slows all three capabilities. Removing the selection signal reduces selection precision as expected, but also drags down utilization and distillation because the policy routes to sub-optimal skills more frequently. Further removing distillation causes utilization scores to drop, even though it still receives its own direct reward. This suggests that each signal contributes to the overall growing trend, which is a direct evidence of co-evolution. 移除任何归因信号都会放缓这三项能力。去掉选择信号会如预期般降低选择精度，但也会拖累利用和蒸馏，因为策略更频繁地路由到次优技能。进一步移除蒸馏后，利用得分也会下降，尽管它仍然获得自身的直接奖励。这表明，每个信号都对整体增长趋势有贡献，这直接证明了共演化。

                                                                                                                                                  4.3.3 Selection and Distillation Quality

                                                                                                                                                  4.3.3 技能选择与蒸馏质量

                                                                                                                                                  The previous section shows that capability metrics rise together. Here we examine the qualitative nature of that improvement: does the policy actually learn to select more relevant skills and distill higher-quality ones? 上一节表明能力指标会同步提升。这里我们从定性角度检验这种进步的性质：策略是否确实学会选择更相关的技能，并蒸馏出更高质量的技能？

                                                                                                                                                  The policy learns to generate increasingly precise selection queries. Figure 4 measures task-skill similarity at three checkpoints. Full Skill1 improves from 0.51 to 0.60 across training because the trend signal rewards queries that retrieve historically high-utility skills, gradually sharpening the policy's ability to describe what it needs. Removing the selection signal slows this learning, and without learned selection entirely, similarity stays almost flat at the lowest level. 策略学会生成越来越精确的选择查询。图4在三个检查点上衡量任务-技能相似度。完整的 Skill1 在训练过程中由 0.51 提升到 0.60，因为趋势信号会奖励能检索到历史高效技能的查询，从而逐步增强策略对自身需求的表述能力。移除选择信号会减慢这一学习；如果完全没有学习到选择机制，相似度也会几乎保持不变在最低水平。

                                                                                                                                                  The library ceiling rises as the policy learns to distill better skills. Figure 5 tracks U^ ,the utility of the top-ranked skill per task. A rising U^ means increasingly effective skills are entering the library, not merely more skills. Full Skill1 reaches 0.91 by step 85 while both ablations lag by approximately 0.10. The variation signal creates this pressure: producing a skill similar to existing ones yields little reward, so the policy must discover genuinely better strategies to obtain positive gradient. 随着策略学会蒸馏更好的技能，库容量上限也随之提高。图5追踪每项任务中排名第一的技能的 U^（效用）。U^ 的上升意味着越来越有效的技能进入了技能库，而不仅仅是技能数量更多。完整的 Skill1 在第 85 步达到 0.91，而两个消融实验大约落后 0.10。变化信号制造了这种压力：生成与现有技能相似的技能几乎得不到奖励，因此策略必须发现真正更好的策略，才能获得正梯度。

                                                                                                                                                  4.3.4 Skill Library Diversity

                                                                                                                                                  4.3.4 技能库多样性

                                                                                                                                                  We examine whether the library is utilized as a diverse collective asset or collapses to a few dominant entries. Figure 6 visualizes the converged libraries with and without credit-assignment signals. 我们考察该库是作为一个多样化的集体资产被利用，还是退化为少数占主导的条目。图6展示了有无信用分配信号时收敛后的技能库。

                                                                                                                                                  Co-evolution activates a broader set of skills. Skill1 uses a broader set of skills. As observed in Figure 6, the skill usage count distributes more uniformly in the left panel. Without evolving signals (i.e., Skill1 w/o Select. and Distill.), the skill usage count distribution sharpens, where only a small number of popular skills are intensively utilized. 协同进化激活了更广泛的一组技能。Skill1 使用了更广泛的一组技能。如图6所示，左侧面板中的技能使用次数分布更为均匀。若不进化信号（即 Skill1 w/o Select. and Distill.），技能使用次数分布会变得更尖锐，只有少数热门技能被密集使用。

                                                                                                                                                  Frequently used skills cover diverse strategies. We also observe that the active skills in Skill1 span a much broader region of the strategy space. On the contrary, the popular skills (red and purple ones) on the right subfigure huddle together with only limited coverage. In the design of our method, producing a under-performing skill similar to existing ones yields negative reward, so the policy is pressured to cover underserved scenarios rather than duplicating successful ones. 高频使用的技能涵盖了多样策略。我们还观察到，Skill1 中的活跃技能覆盖了更广泛的策略空间。相反，右侧子图中的热门技能（红色和紫色）彼此聚集，覆盖范围有限。在我们方法的设计中，生成一个与现有技能相似但表现不佳的技能会带来负奖励，因此策略会被迫覆盖未被充分服务的场景，而不是复制成功的技能。

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Figure 6: T-SNE visualization of the skill libraries after convergence, with and without RL-trained selection and distillation. The top-10 percent most frequently used skills are highlighted. Skill1 activates nearly twice as many high-frequency skills, and these skills span a broader strategy space. 图6：在有无经 RL 训练的选择与蒸馏机制下，收敛后技能库的 T-SNE 可视化。高频使用排名前 10% 的技能已高亮显示。Skill1 激活了几乎多出一倍的高频技能，且这些技能覆盖了更广泛的策略空间。

                                                                                                                                                  Table 3: Computational cost on ALFWorld training. We report wall-clock time per step (seconds) and library size (number of skills) at three checkpoints. 表3：ALFWorld 训练中的计算开销。我们报告了三个检查点的每步墙钟时间（秒）和库大小（技能数）。

                                                                                                                                                  MethodTime / Step (s)Library Size
                                                                                                                                                  Step 20Step 60Step 100Step 20Step 60Step 100
                                                                                                                                                  GRPO (no library)301.3274.1296.7---
                                                                                                                                                  SkillRL368.1319.0326.6607183
                                                                                                                                                  Skill1386.6444.3493.89153,8995,000
                                                                                                                                                  w/o Select.367.4406.7521.88923,6935,000
                                                                                                                                                  w/o Distill.508.8750.1738.42,2125,0005,000
                                                                                                                                                  方法时间 / 步骤（秒）库大小
                                                                                                                                                  第20步第60步第100步第20步第60步第100步
                                                                                                                                                  GRPO（无库）301.3274.1296.7---
                                                                                                                                                  SkillRL368.1319.0326.6607183
                                                                                                                                                  Skill1386.6444.3493.89153,8995,000
                                                                                                                                                  无选择367.4406.7521.88923,6935,000
                                                                                                                                                  无蒸馏508.8750.1738.42,2125,0005,000

                                                                                                                                                  4.3.5 Computational Overhead

                                                                                                                                                  4.3.5 计算开销

                                                                                                                                                  We compare wall-clock time and library size for Skill1, SkillRL, and two ablations under identical hardware of 8 H800 80GB GPUs. 我们在相同的8张H800 80GB GPU硬件条件下，对Skill1、SkillRL以及两个消融版本的墙钟时间和库大小进行比较。

                                                                                                                                                  Skill1 adds moderate overhead over baseline methods. GRPO without a library runs at approximately 290s per step. SkillRL maintains near-constant cost because its library grows minimally from 60 to 83 skills, but this static library limits final performance to 89.9% compared to 97.5% for Skill1. Skill1 operates at 387 to 494s, roughly 1.3 to 1.7 times as slow as GRPO, with the increase stemming from the growing library context. The selection step itself adds negligible overhead as query generation and re-ranking operate on short sequences compared to multi-turn interactions against the environment. 与基线方法相比，Skill1带来适度的开销。无库的GRPO每步运行时间约为290秒。SkillRL的成本几乎保持恒定，因为其库规模仅从60个技能小幅增长到83个技能，但这种静态库将最终性能限制在89.9%，而Skill1可达97.5%。Skill1的运行时间为387到494秒，约为GRPO的1.3到1.7倍，增加主要来自不断扩大的库上下文。选择步骤本身的开销可忽略不计，因为相较于与环境的多轮交互，查询生成和重排序仅处理较短序列。

                                                                                                                                                  Distillation controls both library quality and computational cost. Without distillation, raw trajectories enter the library directly, growing it at 2.4 times the rate of Skill1. The larger library lengthens the selection context, making the variant without distillation 69% slower by step 60 and saturating the 5,000-skill cap far earlier. Distillation compresses experience into concise skills, improving library quality while keeping computational cost in check. 蒸馏同时控制库质量与计算成本。若不进行蒸馏，原始轨迹会直接进入库中，使其增长速度达到Skill1的2.4倍。更大的库会拉长选择上下文，使不蒸馏版本在第60步时慢69%，并更早达到5,000技能上限。蒸馏将经验压缩为简洁的技能，在控制计算成本的同时提升库质量。

                                                                                                                                                  5 Conclusion and Limitations

                                                                                                                                                  5 结论与局限性

                                                                                                                                                  Conclusion. We present Skill1, a framework that trains a single policy to co-evolve skill selection, utilization, and distillation toward a shared task-outcome objective. By decomposing this signal into its low-frequency trend and high-frequency variation, Skill1 derives per-capability credit assignment without auxiliary rewards. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebShop show consistent gains over prior skill-based and RL baselines, and ablations confirm that the three capabilities evolve in a coupled manner. A natural next step is to extend this lifecycle to hierarchical or multi-agent settings, where skill sharing and conflict resolution introduce new challenges for unified credit assignment. 结论。我们提出了Skill1，一个训练单一策略以围绕共享的任务结果目标共同演化技能选择、使用与蒸馏的框架。通过将该信号分解为低频趋势和高频波动，Skill1在无需辅助奖励的情况下，为各项能力推导出逐项信用分配。在ALFWorld和WebShop上的实验表明，相较于此前基于技能和基于RL的基线方法，Skill1始终取得更好的效果；消融实验也证实这三种能力是以耦合方式演化的。一个自然的下一步是将这一生命周期扩展到分层或多智能体场景，在这些场景中，技能共享与冲突解决会为统一的信用分配带来新的挑战。

                                                                                                                                                  Limitations. While Skill1 achieves strong performance, several limitations remain. 局限性。尽管Skill1取得了很强的性能，但仍存在若干局限。

                                                                                                                                                  • Environment coverage. Our evaluation is limited to two representative text-based agent environments. Whether the co-evolution framework generalizes to more environments (e.g., deep search environments) or those with visual observations remains unexplored.

                                                                                                                                                  • 环境覆盖范围。我们的评估仅限于两个具有代表性的文本型智能体环境。共演化框架能否推广到更多环境（例如深度搜索环境）或带有视觉观测的环境，仍有待探索。

                                                                                                                                                  • Scalability of the skill library. The library capacity in this work is capped at 5,000 entries. As the diversity of tasks grows, the fixed-size library may become a bottleneck, and more sophisticated eviction or hierarchical organization strategies may be required.

                                                                                                                                                  • 技能库的可扩展性。本文中的库容量上限为5,000条。随着任务多样性的增加，固定大小的库可能成为瓶颈，可能需要更复杂的淘汰或分层组织策略。
