                                                                                                                                                  A Related Work

                                                                                                                                                  相关工作

                                                                                                                                                  Reinforcement Learning for LLM Agents. Core algorithmic advances include GRPO (Shao et al., 2024), anchor-state grouping (Feng et al., 2025), and dynamic sampling with asymmetric clipping (Yu et al., 2025). Multi-turn RL methods address long-horizon challenges through hierarchical value functions (Zhou et al., 2024), leave-one-out advantage estimation (Chen et al., 2025), MCTS-guided search (Putta et al., 2024), exploration-based trajectory optimization (Song et al., 2024), multi-turn self-evolution (Wang et al., 2025b; Zhang et al., 2025a), and cross-episode meta-RL (Jiang et al., 2025b). Recent work further refines credit assignment via stepwise progress attribution (Wang et al., 2025c; Wei et al., 2025a) or intrinsic exploration signals (Gao et al., 2025; Wang et al., 2025d). Prompt-based methods such as ReAct (Yao et al., 2022b) and Reflexion (Shinn et al., 2023) enable reasoning without parameter updates but are upper-bounded by the frozen policy (Abel et al., 2023). Skill 1 extends GRPO by decomposing a single task-outcome signal into stage-specific gradients for selection, utilization, and distillation within a unified RL objective. 面向 LLM 代理的强化学习。核心算法进展包括 GRPO（Shao et al., 2024）、锚状态分组（Feng et al., 2025）以及带非对称裁剪的动态采样（Yu et al., 2025）。多轮 RL 方法通过层次化价值函数（Zhou et al., 2024）、留一优势估计（Chen et al., 2025）、MCTS 引导搜索（Putta et al., 2024）、基于探索的轨迹优化（Song et al., 2024）、多轮自进化（Wang et al., 2025b; Zhang et al., 2025a）以及跨回合元 RL（Jiang et al., 2025b）来应对长时程挑战。近期工作进一步通过逐步进展归因（Wang et al., 2025c; Wei et al., 2025a）或内在探索信号（Gao et al., 2025; Wang et al., 2025d）细化信用分配。ReAct（Yao et al., 2022b）和 Reflexion（Shinn et al., 2023）等基于提示的方法无需参数更新即可实现推理，但其上限受冻结策略所限（Abel et al., 2023）。Skill1 在统一 RL 目标下，将单一任务结果信号分解为用于选择、利用和蒸馏的阶段特定梯度，从而扩展了 GRPO。

                                                                                                                                                  Experience Reusing. Structuring past experience for reuse improves RL sample efficiency (Zhan et al., 2025; Ye et al., 2026; Muhtar et al., 2026), and explicit memory systems that store interaction histories (Wei et al., 2025b; Liu et al., 2026a,b) or distilled lessons (Fang et al., 2025; Zhou et al., 2025; Wang et al., 2025e) support continuous adaptation. RetroAgent (Zhang et al., 2026a) combines intrinsic progress rewards with language-based lesson extraction and a utility-aware selection strategy (Auer et al., 2002). Critique-GRPO (Zhang et al., 2025b) integrates natural-language critiques with numerical rewards, and RL-based self-distillation (Hubotter et al., 2026) refines failed trajectories into policy updates. Retrospective self-correction through natural-language critiques (Madaan et al., 2023; Yao et al., 2023) further enables agents to learn from failures (Liu and Van Der Schaar, 2025). Skill1 builds on these insights but derives all learning signals from a single task-outcome signal, eliminating the need for separate intrinsic reward design. 经验复用。将过往经验结构化以供复用，可提升 RL 样本效率（Zhan et al., 2025; Ye et al., 2026; Muhtar et al., 2026）；而存储交互历史（Wei et al., 2025b; Liu et al., 2026a,b）或蒸馏经验（Fang et al., 2025; Zhou et al., 2025; Wang et al., 2025e）的显式记忆系统，则支持持续适应。RetroAgent（Zhang et al., 2026a）将内在进展奖励、基于语言的经验提取以及效用感知选择策略（Auer et al., 2002）结合起来。Critique-GRPO（Zhang et al., 2025b）将自然语言批评与数值奖励整合，而基于 RL 的自蒸馏（Hubotter et al., 2026）则将失败轨迹细化为策略更新。通过自然语言批评进行回顾性自我纠正（Madaan et al., 2023; Yao et al., 2023）进一步使代理能够从失败中学习（Liu and Van Der Schaar, 2025）。Skill1 借鉴了这些思路，但其所有学习信号均由单一任务结果信号导出，无需单独设计内在奖励。

                                                                                                                                                  Skill Libraries for LLM Agents. A growing body of work equips LLM agents with persistent skill libraries (Jiang et al., 2026a; Xu and Yan, 2026; Li et al., 2026b; Jiang et al., 2026b; Anthropic, 2025). For selection, approaches include frozen embedding selectors (Xia et al., 2026; Muhtar et al., 2026), heuristic scoring (Zhang et al., 2026a), learned routing (Zhang et al., 2026b; Wang et al., 2026), and policy log-probability ranking (Li et al., 2026a; Wu et al., 2025). For utilization, RL-based methods condition the policy on selected skills (Xia et al., 2026; Muhtar et al., 2026; Zhang et al., 2026a; Li et al., 2026a; Wang et al., 2025a), sometimes with hierarchical rewards to incentivize skill use (Li et al., 2026a; Muhtar et al., 2026). For distillation, methods range from prompt-based extraction (Zhao et al., 2024) and training-free skill versioning (Yang et al., 2026) to teacher-driven generation (Xia et al., 2026), co-evolving extractors (Muhtar et al., 2026), and self-reflection (Zhang et al., 2026a; Wang et al., 2025a; Wu et al., 2025; Qiao et al., 2026). Existing methods have not yet achieved RL-optimized status on all three stages simultaneously, and those that optimize multiple stages use heterogeneous learning signals without a unified objective. Skill0 (Lu et al., 2026) internalizes skills into model parameters with zero external skills; Skill1 co-evolves all three stages through one policy model and a unified task outcome signal. 面向 LLM 代理的技能库。越来越多的工作为 LLM 代理配备持久化技能库（Jiang et al., 2026a; Xu and Yan, 2026; Li et al., 2026b; Jiang et al., 2026b; Anthropic, 2025）。在选择方面，方法包括冻结的嵌入选择器（Xia et al., 2026; Muhtar et al., 2026）、启发式评分（Zhang et al., 2026a）、学习式路由（Zhang et al., 2026b; Wang et al., 2026）以及策略对数概率排序（Li et al., 2026a; Wu et al., 2025）。在利用方面，基于 RL 的方法以所选技能为条件来约束策略（Xia et al., 2026; Muhtar et al., 2026; Zhang et al., 2026a; Li et al., 2026a; Wang et al., 2025a），有时还结合层次化奖励来激励技能使用（Li et al., 2026a; Muhtar et al., 2026）。在蒸馏方面，方法从基于提示的提取（Zhao et al., 2024）和无训练技能版本化（Yang et al., 2026），到教师驱动生成（Xia et al., 2026）、共演化提取器（Muhtar et al., 2026）以及自我反思（Zhang et al., 2026a; Wang et al., 2025a; Wu et al., 2025; Qiao et al., 2026）不等。现有方法尚未在三个阶段上同时达到 RL 优化状态，而那些优化多个阶段的方法使用的是异构学习信号，缺乏统一目标。Skill0（Lu et al., 2026）将技能内化到模型参数中，外部技能为零；Skill1 则通过一个策略模型和统一的任务结果信号协同演化全部三个阶段。

                                                                                                                                                  B Algorithm Details

                                                                                                                                                  B 算法细节

                                                                                                                                                  We use Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) (Shao et al., 2024) as the optimization method, which eliminates the need for a separate value network by computing advantages relative to a group of rollouts sampled from the same task. For each task d ,a group of G rollouts {τi}i=1G is sampled from πθ old  . The group-relative advantage for rollout i is: 我们使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）（Shao 等，2024）作为优化方法，它无需额外的价值网络：通过在同一任务上采样得到一组轨迹来计算相对于该组的优势。对每个任务 d ，从 πθ old  采样得到一组 G 个轨迹 {τi}i=1G。轨迹 i 的组相对优势为：

                                                                                                                                                  (12)A^i=r(τi)−mean({r(τ1),…,r(τG)})std({r(τ1),…,r(τG)}).

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Let ρt(i)(θ)=πθ(at(i)∣st(i))/πθ old (at(i)∣st(i)) denote the per-token importance ratio. The GRPO objective maximizes the clipped surrogate: 令 ρt(i)(θ)=πθ(at(i)∣st(i))/πθ old (at(i)∣st(i)) 表示逐 token 的重要性比率。GRPO 目标最大化截断的替代目标：

                                                                                                                                                  (13)JGRPO(θ)=1G∑i=1G⁡1|τi|∑t=1|τi|⁡min(ρt(i)A^i,clip(ρt(i),1−ϵ,1+ϵ)A^i)−βDKL[πθ∥πref],

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  where ϵ is the clipping ratio, β controls KL regularization toward a reference policy π ref  ,and |τi| is the number of tokens in rollout i . 其中 ϵ 为截断比率，β 控制对参考策略 π ref  的 KL 正则化，且 |τi| 为轨迹 i 中的 token 数。

                                                                                                                                                  C Implementation Details

                                                                                                                                                  C 实现细节

                                                                                                                                                  Training infrastructure. Skill1 is trained on 8 NVIDIA H800-80GB GPUs using the VeRL framework (Sheng et al., 2024) with Fully Sharded Data Parallelism (FSDP) under BFloat16 precision. Rollout generation uses vLLM with tensor parallelism of 4. Training converges in approximately 100 to 150 steps (roughly 30 hours on ALFWorld). The auxiliary objective weights are λ1=λ2=0.3 throughout all experiments unless otherwise specified. 训练基础设施。Skill1 在 8 张 NVIDIA H800-80GB GPU 上使用 VeRL 框架（Sheng et al., 2024）训练，采用 BFloat16 精度下的完全分片数据并行（FSDP）。Rollout 生成使用带有 4 路张量并行的 vLLM。训练大约在 100 到 150 步内收敛（在 ALFWorld 上约 30 小时）。除非另有说明，所有实验中的辅助目标权重均为 λ1=λ2=0.3。

                                                                                                                                                  Baseline reproduction. We reproduce RetroAgent using its official implementation. 1 For SkillRL, EvolveR, Mem0, and SimpleMem, we use numbers reported in their respective papers (Xia et al., 2026; Wu et al., 2025; Chhikara et al., 2025; Liu et al., 2026a) under the same base model (Qwen2.5- 7B-Instruct). GiGPO results are taken from Feng et al. (2025). All RL baselines use identical training budgets (150 epochs) and the same train/test splits to ensure fair comparison. 基线复现。我们使用其官方实现复现 RetroAgent。1 对于 SkillRL、EvolveR、Mem0 和 SimpleMem，我们采用各自论文中报告的结果（Xia et al., 2026; Wu et al., 2025; Chhikara et al., 2025; Liu et al., 2026a），并使用相同的基础模型（Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct）。GiGPO 的结果取自 Feng et al. (2025)。所有 RL 基线都使用相同的训练预算（150 个 epoch）和相同的训练/测试划分，以确保公平比较。

                                                                                                                                                  Hyperparameters. Table 4 lists the shared training hyperparameters across both environments. Table 5 lists the per-environment differences. Table 6 lists the skill library configuration. 超参数。表 4 列出了两个环境共享的训练超参数。表 5 列出了各环境的差异。表 6 列出了技能库配置。

                                                                                                                                                  Table 4: Shared training hyperparameters. 表 4：共享训练超参数。

                                                                                                                                                  HyperparameterValue
                                                                                                                                                  Optimization
                                                                                                                                                  AlgorithmGRPO
                                                                                                                                                  Learning rate$1 \times {10}^{-6}$
                                                                                                                                                  KL loss coefficient0.01

                                                                                                                                                  PPO mini-batch size256

                                                                                                                                                  Re-ranking loss weight ${\lambda }_{1}$0.3
                                                                                                                                                  Distillation loss weight ${\lambda }_{2}$0.3
                                                                                                                                                  Rollout
                                                                                                                                                  Group size $G$16
                                                                                                                                                  Max prompt length16,384 tokens
                                                                                                                                                  Max response length2,048 tokens
                                                                                                                                                  vLLM tensor parallelism4

                                                                                                                                                  学习率$1 \times {10}^{-6}$

                                                                                                                                                  KL 损失类型低方差 KL

                                                                                                                                                  重排序损失权重 ${\lambda }_{1}$0.3

                                                                                                                                                  D Statistical Analysis

                                                                                                                                                  D 统计分析

                                                                                                                                                  We run all methods with 3 independent random seeds and report mean ± standard deviation (1- σ ). The primary source of variability is the random seed,which affects parameter initialization, rollout sampling order, and skill library evolution trajectory. We use SciPy's ttest_ind with equal_var=False (Welch's t-test) to assess statistical significance. 我们使用 3 个独立随机种子运行所有方法，并报告均值 ± 标准差（1- σ ）。主要变异来源是随机种子，它会影响参数初始化、回合采样顺序以及技能库的演化轨迹。我们使用 SciPy 的 ttest_ind 并设定 equal_var=False（Welch’s t 检验）来评估统计显著性。

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  1 https://github.com/zhangxy-2019/RetroAgent 1 https://github.com/zhangxy-2019/RetroAgent

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Table 6: Skill library configuration. 表 6：技能库配置。

                                                                                                                                                  ParameterValue
                                                                                                                                                  Selection
                                                                                                                                                  Encoderall-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384-dim)
                                                                                                                                                  Top- $K$ candidates5
                                                                                                                                                  Training selection strategyUCB
                                                                                                                                                  Evaluation selection strategyGreedy
                                                                                                                                                  UCB exploration scale1.0
                                                                                                                                                  Similarity weight ${w}_{\text{ sim }}$0.6
                                                                                                                                                  Library Management
                                                                                                                                                  Maximum library size5,000
                                                                                                                                                  Utility EMA rate $\alpha$0.05
                                                                                                                                                  参数值
                                                                                                                                                  选择
                                                                                                                                                  编码器all-MiniLM-L6-v2（384 维）
                                                                                                                                                  前 $K$ 个候选项5
                                                                                                                                                  训练选择策略UCB
                                                                                                                                                  评估选择策略贪心
                                                                                                                                                  UCB 探索尺度1.0
                                                                                                                                                  相似度权重 ${w}_{\text{ sim }}$0.6
                                                                                                                                                  库管理
                                                                                                                                                  最大库大小5,000
                                                                                                                                                  效用 EMA 率 $\alpha$0.05

                                                                                                                                                  D.1 Full Performance Breakdown

                                                                                                                                                  D.1 全面性能细分

                                                                                                                                                  We select RetroAgent as the strongest baseline and run it with 3 independent seeds under identical conditions to obtain variance estimates. Figure 7 reports per-task-type success rates (mean ± std) on ALFWorld. 我们选择 RetroAgent 作为最强基线，并在相同条件下用 3 个相互独立的随机种子运行它，以获得方差估计。图 7 在 ALFWorld 上报告各任务类型的成功率（均值 ± 标准差）。

                                                                                                                                                  D.2 Analysis

                                                                                                                                                  D.2 分析

                                                                                                                                                  Skill1 achieves statistically significant improvement over RetroAgent. On the aggregate metric (ALF All), Skill achieves 97.5±0.6 versus RetroAgent's 94.9±0.9. A Welch's t-test on the 3-seed averages yields t=4.06 ,df =3.40,p=0.021(<0.05) . The result confirms that the gain is not attributable to seed variance. Per-task significance is strongest on the tasks where RetroAgent struggles most: Heat (p=0.004) ,Cool (p=0.005) ,and Look (p=0.020) . The sole exception is Clean, where Skill1 trails RetroAgent by 1.9 points. This difference is not statistically significant (p=0.147>0.05) and falls within normal seed variance. Skill1 相较于 RetroAgent 实现了具有统计显著性的提升。在总体指标（ALF All）上，Skill 的成绩为 97.5±0.6，而 RetroAgent 为 94.9±0.9。对 3 个随机种子平均值进行 Welch t 检验得到 t=4.06 ，df =3.40,p=0.021(<0.05) 。结果表明，这一提升并非由种子方差造成。按任务来看，显著性在 RetroAgent 最薄弱的任务上最强：Heat (p=0.004) 、Cool (p=0.005) 和 Look (p=0.020) 。唯一的例外是 Clean，Skill1 比 RetroAgent 低 1.9 分。该差异不具统计显著性 (p=0.147>0.05) ，且在正常的种子方差范围内。

                                                                                                                                                  Skill1 exhibits lower aggregate variance than RetroAgent. Skill1's overall standard deviation (0.6) is smaller than RetroAgent's (0.9), indicating more stable convergence across seeds. The unified evolution framework, where selection, utilization, and distillation reinforce each other, reduces sensitivity to initialization. Skill1 的总体方差低于 RetroAgent。Skill1 的整体标准差（0.6）小于 RetroAgent（0.9），表明其在不同种子下收敛更稳定。统一进化框架中，选择、利用和蒸馏相互促进，从而降低了对初始化的敏感性。

                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                  Figure 7: Per-task success rates (mean ± std over 3 seeds). Skill1 consistently outperforms best baseline RetroAgent on five of six task types and the average score. 图 7：各任务成功率（3 个种子的平均值 ± 标准差）。Skill1 在六类任务中的五类以及平均分上，始终优于最佳基线 RetroAgent。

                                                                                                                                                  E Broader Impacts

                                                                                                                                                  E 更广泛影响

                                                                                                                                                  This work develops a framework for LLM agents to autonomously acquire and reuse behavioral skills through reinforcement learning. On the positive side, the approach can reduce the manual engineering effort required to build capable agents and enable more sample-efficient learning in interactive environments. 这项工作为 LLM 智能体开发了一套框架，使其能够通过强化学习自主获取并复用行为技能。就积极方面而言，该方法可以降低构建高能力智能体所需的手动工程工作，并在交互式环境中实现更高样本效率的学习。

                                                                                                                                                  On the negative side, agents that autonomously accumulate skills may exhibit emergent behaviors that are difficult to predict or audit. In high-stakes deployment scenarios, an unconstrained skill library could encode harmful action sequences, and brings new injection risks. We recommend deploying such systems with human-in-the-loop oversight and constraining the action space in safe domains. 就消极方面而言，自主积累技能的智能体可能会出现新生的行为模式，这些模式难以预测或审计。在高风险部署场景中，缺乏约束的技能库可能会编码有害的行动序列，并带来新的注入风险。我们建议在引入人类在场监督的前提下部署此类系统，并在安全领域内约束行动空间。

                                                                                                                                                  F Case Studies

                                                                                                                                                  F 案例研究

                                                                                                                                                  We present two representative case studies from the ALFWorld evaluation, comparing Skill 1 against RetroAgent on the same test task. Each case demonstrates a different transfer mechanism (failure avoidance and error correction) and highlights why unified evolution of selection, utilization, and distillation produces qualitatively different behavior from baselines that lack joint optimization. 我们在 ALFWorld 评估中呈现两个具有代表性的案例，在相同测试任务上对比 Skill 1 与 RetroAgent。每个案例都展示了不同的迁移机制（规避失败与纠错），并说明为何对选择、利用与蒸馏进行统一进化，会带来与缺乏联合优化的基线截然不同的行为表现。

                                                                                                                                                  Case Study 1: Failure Avoidance via Appliance Selection

                                                                                                                                                  案例研究1：通过电器选择避免失败

                                                                                                                                                  Test task: heat some plate and put it in cabinet. 测试任务：加热一块盘子并把它放进橱柜。

                                                                                                                                                  Challenge: The environment contains both stoveburners and a microwave. Stoveburners are non-functional for plates, but this constraint is invisible from the task description. 挑战：环境里同时有炉灶和微波炉。炉灶不能用于加热盘子，但这一限制在任务描述中看不出来。

                                                                                                                                                  Skill1: Retrieved Skill (Utility: 0.951, Used 593 times) Skill1：检索到的技能（效用：0.951，使用593次）

                                                                                                                                                  Origin task: heat some plate and put it in fridge. 来源任务：加热一块盘子并把它放进冰箱。

                                                                                                                                                  Description: Useful when the agent needs to heat an object using a microwave, especially when stove burners are not effective. 描述：当智能体需要用微波炉加热物体时很有用，尤其是在炉灶不够有效的情况下。

                                                                                                                                                  Strategy: "Successfully used microwave 1 to heat the plate. The attempt failed to heat the plate using the stoveburners, which might not have been operational. The microwave 1 was found on countertop 2." 策略：“成功使用微波炉1给盘子加热。尝试用炉灶加热盘子失败，可能是因为炉灶未正常运行。微波炉1在操作台面2上找到。”

                                                                                                                                                  Skill1 reasoning (step 3): "I have already picked up the plate from countertop 1. The microwave 1 is the most suitable option for heating the plate, as mentioned in past reflections. I will go to the microwave 1 to heat the plate." Skill1推理（第3步）：“我已经从操作台面1拿起了盘子。根据过去的反思，微波炉1是加热这块盘子的最合适选择。我将去微波炉1给盘子加热。”

                                                                                                                                                  Skill1 execution trace (6 actions, optimal): Skill1执行追踪（6个动作，最优）：

                                                                                                                                                  1. go to countertop 1

                                                                                                                                                  2. 去操作台面1

                                                                                                                                                  1. take plate 1 from countertop 1

                                                                                                                                                  2. 从操作台面1拿起盘子1

                                                                                                                                                  1. go to microwave 1

                                                                                                                                                  2. 去微波炉1

                                                                                                                                                  1. heat plate 1 with microwave 1

                                                                                                                                                  2. 用微波炉1加热盘子1

                                                                                                                                                  1. go to cabinet 1

                                                                                                                                                  2. 去橱柜1

                                                                                                                                                  1. put plate 1 in cabinet 1 ✓ SUCCESS

                                                                                                                                                  2. 把盘子1放进橱柜1 ✓ 成功

                                                                                                                                                  Case Study 2: Error Correction via Object Targeting

                                                                                                                                                  案例研究2：通过目标对象进行错误纠正

                                                                                                                                                  Test task: examine the alarmclock with the desklamp. 测试任务：检查装有台灯的闹钟。

                                                                                                                                                  Challenge: The room contains multiple alarmclock instances. Targeting the wrong instance leads to task failure. 挑战：房间里有多个闹钟实例。锁定了错误的实例会导致任务失败。

                                                                                                                                                  Skill1: Retrieved Skill (Utility: 0.997, Used 112 times)

                                                                                                                                                  Skill1：检索到的技能（效用：0.997，使用 112 次）

                                                                                                                                                  Origin task: look at alarmclock under the desklamp. 起始任务：查看桌灯下的闹钟。

                                                                                                                                                  Description: Useful when the agent needs to target a specific object under a desklamp before using the desklamp to view the object. 描述：当智能体需要先锁定桌灯下的特定物体，再使用桌灯来查看该物体时，这个技能很有用。

                                                                                                                                                  Strategy: "The desklamp 1 was used on alarmclock 2 instead of the alarmclock under the desklamp. The agent should locate the alarmclock under the desklamp first before using the desklamp." 策略：“我把桌灯 1 用在了闹钟 2 上，而不是桌灯下的闹钟。智能体应先找到桌灯下的闹钟，再使用桌灯。”

                                                                                                                                                  Skill1 reasoning (step 1): "I need to find an alarmclock and use the desklamp on it. I'll start by examining the dresser 1 to find both the alarmclock and desklamp." Skill1 推理（步骤 1）：“我需要找到一个闹钟，并把桌灯用在它上。我要先检查梳妆台 1，找出闹钟和桌灯。”

                                                                                                                                                  Skill1 execution trace (3 actions, minimal): Skill1 执行轨迹（3 个动作，最少）：

                                                                                                                                                  1. go to dresser 1

                                                                                                                                                  2. 去梳妆台 1

                                                                                                                                                  1. take alarmclock 1 from dresser 1

                                                                                                                                                  2. 从梳妆台 1 拿起闹钟 1

                                                                                                                                                  1. use desklamp 1 ✓ SUCCESS

                                                                                                                                                  2. 使用桌灯 1 ✓ 成功

                                                                                                                                                  Discussion. Both cases illustrate how the co-evolved skill library captures knowledge that goes beyond surface-level pattern matching. Case 1 demonstrates failure avoidance: RetroAgent lacks a high-utility skill encoding the stoveburner constraint because its selection mechanism is not optimized to route heat-tasks to the relevant skill. Skill 1 retrieves the correct skill and explicitly cites it in its reasoning chain. Case 2 demonstrates error correction: RetroAgent picks the wrong alarmclock instance because its library does not preserve the targeting lesson from prior failures with sufficient utility. Skill1's variation-driven distillation retains such lessons and the trend-driven selection surfaces them at test time. In both cases, Skill 1 achieves near-optimal trajectories while the baseline exhausts steps on avoidable mistakes. 讨论。两种情况都说明，协同进化得到的技能库能够捕捉超出表层模式匹配的知识。案例 1 展示了规避失败：RetroAgent 缺少对 stoveburner 约束进行高效用编码的技能，因为其选择机制未优化到能把加热任务路由到相关技能。Skill 1 检索到了正确技能，并在其推理链中明确引用它。案例 2 展示了错误纠正：RetroAgent 会选择错误的闹钟实例，因为它的技能库没有以足够的效用保留来自先前失败的“定目标”经验。Skill1 基于变体驱动的蒸馏会保留这些经验，并由趋势驱动的选择在测试时将它们呈现出来。两种情况下，Skill 1 都实现了接近最优的行动轨迹，而基线方法在可避免的错误上耗尽了步数。

                                                                                                                                                  G Prompt Templates

                                                                                                                                                  G 提示模板

                                                                                                                                                  We list the prompt templates used in each stage of Algorithm 1: 我们列出在算法1的每个阶段中使用的提示模板：

                                                                                                                                                  • Selection (Query generation) (line 3): πθ generates query q to retrieve candidates from B .

                                                                                                                                                  • 选择（生成查询）（第3行）：πθ 生成查询 q ，从 B 中检索候选项。

                                                                                                                                                  • Selection (Re-ranking) (line 6): πθ ranks BK and selects the top skill z .

                                                                                                                                                  • 选择（重排序）（第6行）：πθ 对 BK 进行排序，并选择得分最高的技能 z 。

                                                                                                                                                  • Utilization (line 8): πθ interacts with the environment conditioned on z .strat.

                                                                                                                                                  • 利用（第8行）：πθ 根据 z .strat 与环境进行交互。

                                                                                                                                                  • Distillation (line 9): πθ reflects on τ and produces s new  .

                                                                                                                                                  • 蒸馏（第9行）：πθ 反思 τ ，并生成 s new  。

                                                                                                                                                  G.1 ALFWorld

                                                                                                                                                  G.1 ALFWorld

                                                                                                                                                  Query Generation 查询生成

                                                                                                                                                  Task: {TASK} 任务：{TASK}

                                                                                                                                                  Observation: {INITIAL_OBSERVATION} 观察：{INITIAL_OBSERVATION}

                                                                                                                                                  Write a one-sentence search query to find relevant past experiences for this task. Do NOT output an action. 写一句搜索查询，用于为该任务查找相关的过去经验。不要输出任何动作。

                                                                                                                                                  Example: tips for heating an object with microwave then placing it 示例：用微波炉加热物体然后把它放置的技巧

                                                                                                                                                  Re-ranking

                                                                                                                                                  重新排序

                                                                                                                                                  You are about to attempt a task in the ALFRED Embodied Environment. 你即将尝试在 ALFRED 具身环境中完成一项任务。

                                                                                                                                                  Task: {TASK} 任务：{TASK}

                                                                                                                                                  Initial Observation: {INITIAL_OBSERVATION} 初始观察：{INITIAL_OBSERVATION}

                                                                                                                                                  Below are {K} past experiences retrieved from memory. Each is labeled with an ID. 以下是从记忆中检索到的 {K} 条过往经验。每条经验都带有一个 ID。

                                                                                                                                                  {CANDIDATE_EXPERIENCES} {CANDIDATE_EXPERIENCES}

                                                                                                                                                  Rank these experiences from MOST useful to LEAST useful for the current task. Consider which experience addresses the specific challenges you expect to face. 将这些经验从“最有用”到“最没用”按顺序排序，供当前任务使用。考虑哪条经验能解决你预期将面对的具体挑战。

                                                                                                                                                  Output ONLY the ranked IDs as a comma-separated list within tags. 只输出这些已排序的 ID，并以逗号分隔列表的形式放在 标签内。

                                                                                                                                                  Utilization

                                                                                                                                                  利用

                                                                                                                                                  You are an expert agent operating in the ALFRED Embodied Environment. Your task is to: {TASK} [Injected if a skill is selected:] 你是一名在 ALFRED 具身环境中运行的专家智能体。你的任务是：{TASK} [若已选择技能则注入：]

                                                                                                                                                  Past reflections on similar tasks: {SKILL.strat} 对类似任务的过往反思：{SKILL.strat}

                                                                                                                                                  Warning: These lessons may be outdated. Use them only if they align with your current observation. 警告：这些经验可能已过时。只有在与你当前观察一致时才使用。

                                                                                                                                                  Prior to this step, you have already taken {N} step(s). Below are the most recent {W} observations and the corresponding actions you took: {ACTION_HISTORY} 在执行此步骤之前，你已经采取了 {N} 步。下面是最近的 {W} 条观察以及你采取的对应动作：{ACTION_HISTORY}

                                                                                                                                                  You are now at step {CURRENT_STEP} and your current observation is: {OBSERVATION} 你现在处于第 {CURRENT_STEP} 步，你当前的观察是：{OBSERVATION}

                                                                                                                                                  Your admissible actions of the current situation are: [[ADMISSIBLE_ACTIONS}]. 你在当前情境下可执行的动作是：[[ADMISSIBLE_ACTIONS}].

                                                                                                                                                  You should first reason step-by-step within tags. Then choose an admissible action within tags. 你应先在 标签内逐步推理。然后在 标签中选择一个可执行的动作。

                                                                                                                                                  Distillation

                                                                                                                                                  蒸馏

                                                                                                                                                  You are an expert evaluating an ALFRED Embodied Environment task attempt. 你是一个评估 ALFRED 具身环境任务尝试的专家。

                                                                                                                                                  Your task is to: {TASK} 你的任务是：{TASK}

                                                                                                                                                  The task was {successfully/unsuccessfully} completed. 该任务已{成功/未成功}完成。

                                                                                                                                                  Trajectory of the attempt: {TRAJECTORY} 该尝试的轨迹：{TRAJECTORY}

                                                                                                                                                  Analyze: What subtasks were attempted (pick up, navigate, use appliance, place)? Which succeeded or failed? What specific actions led to this outcome? What is the most valuable lesson? 分析：尝试了哪些子任务（拾取、导航、使用电器、放置）？哪些成功或失败了？导致这一结果的具体动作是什么？最有价值的经验是什么？

                                                                                                                                                  Output your evaluation as JSON: 请以 JSON 格式输出你的评估：

                                                                                                                                                  {"task_success": ..., "action_lesson": "...", "navigation_lesson": "...", {"task_success": ..., "action_lesson": "...", "navigation_lesson": "...",

                                                                                                                                                  "description_head": "[WHEN this lesson is useful -- general task type, not specific task]"} "description_head": "[WHEN this lesson is useful -- general task type, not specific task]"}

                                                                                                                                                  G.2 WebShop

                                                                                                                                                  G.2 WebShop

                                                                                                                                                  Query Generation 查询生成

                                                                                                                                                  Task: {TASK} 任务：{TASK}

                                                                                                                                                  Observation: {INITIAL_OBSERVATION} 观察：{INITIAL_OBSERVATION}

                                                                                                                                                  Write a one-sentence search query to find relevant past experiences for this task. Do NOT output an action. 写一句搜索查询，用于为该任务找到相关的过往经验。不要输出任何动作。

                                                                                                                                                  Example: tips for finding products with specific color and size under budget 示例：在预算内找到特定颜色和尺码的产品的技巧

                                                                                                                                                  Re-ranking

                                                                                                                                                  重排序

                                                                                                                                                  You are about to attempt a shopping task in the WebShop environment. 你即将尝试在 WebShop 环境中完成一项购物任务。

                                                                                                                                                  Task: {TASK} 任务：{TASK}

                                                                                                                                                  Initial Observation: {INITIAL_OBSERVATION} 初始观察：{INITIAL_OBSERVATION}

                                                                                                                                                  Below are {K} past experiences retrieved from memory. Each is labeled with an ID. 下面是从记忆中检索到的 {K} 段过往经验。每段经验都标有一个 ID。

                                                                                                                                                  {CANDIDATE_EXPERIENCES} {CANDIDATE_EXPERIENCES}

                                                                                                                                                  Rank these experiences from MOST useful to LEAST useful for the current task. Consider which experience addresses the specific challenges you expect to face. 请将这些经验从“对当前任务最有用”到“最没用”进行排序。考虑哪段经验能够应对你预期会遇到的具体挑战。

                                                                                                                                                  Output ONLY the ranked IDs as a comma-separated list within tags. 仅输出已排序的 ID 列表，使用逗号分隔，并放在 标签内。

                                                                                                                                                  Utilization

                                                                                                                                                  利用

                                                                                                                                                  You are an expert autonomous agent operating in the WebShop e-commerce environment. 你是一名在 WebShop 电子商务环境中运行的专家级自主代理。

                                                                                                                                                  [Injected if a skill is selected:] [如已选择某项技能：]

                                                                                                                                                  Past reflections on similar tasks: {SKILL.strat} 类似任务的过往反思：{SKILL.strat}

                                                                                                                                                  Warning: These lessons may be outdated. Use them only if they align with your current situation. 警告：这些经验可能已经过时。仅在其与你当前情境相符时使用。

                                                                                                                                                  Your task is to: {TASK}. 你的任务是：{TASK}。

                                                                                                                                                  Prior to this step, you have already taken {N} step(s). Below are the most recent {W} observations and the corresponding actions you took: {ACTION_HISTORY} 在这一步之前，你已经采取了 {N} 步。下面是最近的 {W} 条观察以及你所采取的对应行动：{ACTION_HISTORY}

                                                                                                                                                  You are now at step {CURRENT_STEP} and your current observation is: {OBSERVATION}. Your admissible actions: [{AVAILABLE_ACTIONS}]. 你现在处于第 {CURRENT_STEP} 步，你当前的观察是：{OBSERVATION}。你可执行的动作是：[ {AVAILABLE_ACTIONS} ]。

                                                                                                                                                  You should first reason step-by-step within tags, then choose an admissible action within tags. 你应当先在 标签内一步步推理，然后在 标签内选择一个可执行的动作。

                                                                                                                                                  Distillation

                                                                                                                                                  蒸馏

                                                                                                                                                  You are an expert evaluating a WebShop shopping attempt. 你是一名评估 WebShop 购物尝试的专家。

                                                                                                                                                  Your task is to: {TASK} 你的任务是：{TASK}

                                                                                                                                                  The task was {successfully/unsuccessfully} completed. 该任务已{成功/未成功}完成。

                                                                                                                                                  Trajectory of the attempt: {TRAJECTORY} 尝试过程轨迹：{TRAJECTORY}

                                                                                                                                                  Analyze: What subtasks were attempted (search, filter, select, purchase)? Which succeeded or failed? What specific actions led to this outcome? What are the most valuable lessons? Output your evaluation as JSON: 分析：尝试了哪些子任务（搜索、筛选、选择、购买）？哪些成功了或失败了？哪些具体操作导致了这一结果？最有价值的经验是什么？ 以 JSON 形式输出你的评估：

                                                                                                                                                  {"task_success": ..., "action_lesson": "...", "navigation_lesson": "...", {"task_success": ..., "action_lesson": "...", "navigation_lesson": "...",

                                                                                                                                                  "description_head": "[WHEN this lesson is useful -- general task type, not specific task]"} "description_head": "[当这条经验有用时——通用任务类型，而非具体任务]"}

                                                                                                                                                  快速帮助

                                                                                                                                                  当前模式

                                                                                                                                                  链接样式：—

                                                                                                                                                  复制为：—

                                                                                                                                                  常用操作

                                                                                                                                                  # 图标：复制段落链接 / 片段

                                                                                                                                                  收起/展开大纲：O；回到顶部：T

                                                                                                                                                  显示/隐藏注释：C

                                                                                                                                                  链接样式

                                                                                                                                                  • 原文：#段落（Alt+1）
                                                                                                                                                  • %编码：#%E6%AE%B5%E8%90%BD（Alt+2）
                                                                                                                                                  • 富文本片段（HTML 片段）（Alt+3）
                                                                                                                                                  • 循环切换：U

                                                                                                                                                  复制格式（仅“原文 / %编码”可用）

                                                                                                                                                  • 设为 URL：Alt+U
                                                                                                                                                  • 设为 Markdown：Alt+M
                                                                                                                                                  • 二者切换：M

                                                                                                                                                  大纲与导航

                                                                                                                                                  • 展开全部：E；收起全部：R
                                                                                                                                                  • 滚动时自动高亮并展开对应大纲分支
